parameters.jsCode:
return [
  { json: { url: 'https://openai.com/news/rss.xml',                     source: 'OpenAI Blog' } },
  { json: { url: 'https://deepmind.google/blog/rss.xml',               source: 'Google DeepMind' } },
  { json: { url: 'https://news.ycombinator.com/rss',                   source: 'Hacker News' } },
  { json: { url: 'https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/feed/', source: 'AWS ML Blog' } },
  { json: { url: 'https://cloudblog.withgoogle.com/rss',               source: 'Google Cloud Blog' } },
  { json: { url: 'https://rss.itmedia.co.jp/rss/2.0/aiplus.xml',       source: 'ITmedia AI' } },
  { json: { url: 'https://zenn.dev/topics/ai/feed',                    source: 'Zenn AI' } },
];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ structuredQuery: { from: [{ collectionId: 'articles' }], where: { fieldFilter: { field: { fieldPath: 'url' }, op: 'EQUAL', value: { stringValue: $json.url } } }, limit: 1 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens: 1024, system: 'AI記事要約アシスタント。JSON形式のみで出力。', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'タイトル:' + $json.title + '
内容:' + $json.rawContent + '

以下のJSON形式のみで出力:
{"what":"何が起きたか(1-2文)","why":"なぜ重要か(1-2文)","who":"誰に影響(1文)","importance":"high|medium|low","tags":[]}' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ fields: { title: { stringValue: $json.title }, url: { stringValue: $json.url }, source: { stringValue: $json.source }, publishedAt: { timestampValue: $json.publishedAt }, rawContent: { stringValue: $json.rawContent }, summary: { stringValue: $json.summary }, importance: { stringValue: $json.importance }, tags: { arrayValue: { values: $json.tags.map(t => ({ stringValue: t })) } }, createdAt: { timestampValue: $json.createdAt } } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ structuredQuery: { from: [{ collectionId: 'articles' }], where: { fieldFilter: { field: { fieldPath: 'createdAt' }, op: 'GREATER_THAN_OR_EQUAL', value: { timestampValue: new Date(Date.now() - 7200000).toISOString() } } }, orderBy: [{ field: { fieldPath: 'createdAt' }, direction: 'DESCENDING' }], limit: 100 } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens: 1024, system: 'AI記事トレンド分析アシスタント。JSON形式のみで出力。', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.prompt }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ fields: { date: { stringValue: $json.date }, summary: { stringValue: $json.summary }, keyTopics: { arrayValue: { values: $json.keyTopics.map(t => ({ stringValue: t })) } }, articleCount: { integerValue: String($json.articleCount) }, articleIds: { arrayValue: { values: $json.articleIds.map(id => ({ stringValue: id })) } }, createdAt: { timestampValue: $json.createdAt } } }) }}
